headline: AI Toys Reach Children Before Privacy and Safety Rules Catch Up
summary: AI-powered toys are reaching children faster than privacy and safety regulation can keep up, this analysis warns.

headline: AI toys for young children need tighter rules, researchers warn
summary: Researchers call for tighter rules on AI toys aimed at young children, citing safety and developmental concerns.

headline: The New Wild West of AI Kids’ Toys
summary: A look at the largely unregulated, fast-moving market for AI-powered children’s toys.

headline: AI toys could weaken kids' bond with their parents, 'The Anxious Generation' author says
summary: “The Anxious Generation” author warns that AI companion toys could weaken children’s bonds with their parents.

headline: Chatbot teddies for three-year-olds? Why AI toys are risky for kids
summary: Experts question whether chatbot-powered teddies are appropriate for children as young as three.
